title: Supply Chain Manager - BigBasket Logistics - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - BigBasket Logistics - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with BigBasket Logistics! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About BigBasket Logistics:
BigBasket Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Logistics!
